title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Support dashboard reporting, clean business data, and assist senior analysts with weekly performance insights.

title: Junior Machine Learning Engineer
description: Help build and test predictive models, prepare datasets, and support model evaluation for internal AI products.

title: AI Application Developer
description: Develop simple AI-powered application features, integrate APIs, and assist with prototype deployment.

title: Python Backend Developer
description: Build backend endpoints, connect services to databases, and help maintain clean and testable application logic.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst Intern
description: Assist with log review, vulnerability tracking, and basic incident response documentation for security operations.

title: OT Cybersecurity Research Assistant
description: Support research on industrial control system security, document OT risks, and help review lab test findings.

title: Junior Web Developer
description: Create responsive UI pages, fix small frontend issues, and collaborate with designers on web features.

title: Cloud Support Intern
description: Help monitor cloud resources, assist with support tickets, and document common infrastructure issues.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Develop reports for business teams, track KPIs, and turn operational data into simple management insights.

title: Prompt Engineer Intern
description: Design and test prompts for AI workflows, review output quality, and support prompt documentation.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Prepare datasets, explore trends, and assist the data science team with experiments and reporting.

title: Software Engineer Trainee
description: Work on small product tasks, debug code with mentors, and learn software engineering best practices.

title: NLP Engineer Intern
description: Support text processing pipelines, experiment with language models, and evaluate NLP outputs.

title: Industrial AI Intern
description: Assist with industrial sensor data analysis and help build early AI use cases for plant operations.

title: Junior Automation Data Analyst
description: Analyze automation data, prepare plant performance reports, and support process improvement reviews.
